summary: Frontend testing of Soul Profile integration in onboarding flow. Verified navigation from PetHomePage and SoulBuilder pages works correctly. All features tested are working as expected.

test_results.soul_builder_page_loads: PASS - /soul-builder loads correctly showing preboarding screen for new users or returning user screen for logged-in users
test_results.pet_home_teach_mira_btn: PASS - 'Teach Mira more about [Pet]' button on PetHomePage navigates to /soul-builder (tested with Lola - 9% soul score)
test_results.soul_builder_see_pet_home_btn: PASS - 'See [Pet]'s Home' button on Soul Builder returning user screen navigates to /pet-home?active_pet=[id]
test_results.soul_builder_let_mira_know_more_btn: PASS - 'Let Mira know more' button transitions to questionnaire continuation screen
test_results.onboarding_welcome_complete_soul_btn: CODE VERIFIED - Button at line 1139-1156 with data-testid='complete-soul-profile-btn' calls navigate('/soul-builder')
test_results.onboarding_welcome_skip_btn: CODE VERIFIED - Button at line 1162-1168 with data-testid='skip-to-dashboard-btn' calls navigate('/pet-home')

critical_code_review_comments: Code implementation is correct. All navigation buttons have proper data-testid attributes for testing.
Welcome screen buttons in MiraMeetsYourPet.jsx lines 1139-1168 are properly wired to /soul-builder and /pet-home routes.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Soul Profile integration testing complete. Navigation flows verified: 1) PetHomePage 'Teach Mira more' → /soul-builder, 2) SoulBuilder 'See Pet's Home' → /pet-home, 3) SoulBuilder 'Let Mira know more' → questionnaire. Welcome screen buttons verified via code review (lines 1139-1168 in MiraMeetsYourPet.jsx).
features_tested: PetHomePage 'Teach Mira more about [Pet]' button navigates to /soul-builder - PASS
SoulBuilder returning user 'See [Pet]'s Home' button navigates to /pet-home - PASS
SoulBuilder 'Let Mira know more' button shows questionnaire - PASS
MiraMeetsYourPet Welcome screen 'Complete Soul Profile' button → /soul-builder (code verified)
MiraMeetsYourPet Welcome screen 'Skip for now' button → /pet-home (code verified)
